description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabin constructed primarily from weathered stone and timber, featuring a steep gable roof with wooden trim. The front facade displays a large arched entryway supported by thick stone columns and adorned with wooden beams and rope details, giving it a fortified, medieval appearance. The upper level includes a half-timbered section with small, rectangular windows and visible wooden framework. The side view reveals additional windows and decorative wooden supports, while the rear is mostly plain stone with minimal openings. The structure appears robust and aged, with a rough, matte finish and visible signs of wear. Its design suggests a blend of rustic and medieval influences, suitable for placement in a historical or fantasy urban setting.
description: A tall, narrow stone-and-wood cabin with a steep gable roof, arched entryway, and medieval timbered details. Features small windows, rope accents, and a weathered, rustic finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall stone wall, a small upper window, and the steep gable roof with wooden trim.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by a plain stone wall with a central arched opening and minimal wooden detailing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two small windows, visible wooden supports, and rope details along the stone wall.
description_view_3: Front view featuring a prominent arched entryway, timbered upper section, rope accents, and two large stone columns.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch and wooden trim
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with two small rectangular windows on one side and a single small window on the other; all windows are vertically oriented and spaced apart.
attribute_door_placement: One large arched door centered on the front facade, beneath the timbered upper section.
